what: `ALTER TABLE financial_models ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS version integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 1` for Task #479 mandatory optimistic concurrency.
affectedRecords: All rows in `financial_models`. Count: `SELECT count(*) FROM financial_models;` — the DEFAULT 1 backfills every existing row in a single statement.
rollback: `ALTER TABLE financial_models DROP COLUMN version`. Pre-cutover code does not read or write `version`, so dropping is safe if M7 is rolled back.
window: `inline` — Drizzle migrator runs on API boot before the server accepts traffic.
